messages.content: how do I reset my password

It looks like I don't have the password reset instructions document in my knowledge base. Let me provide the steps verbally:

1. Go to the login page of our website and click the "Forgot Password" link.
2. Enter the email address associated with your account.
3. You will receive an email with instructions to reset your password. Follow the steps in that email.
4. Once you've reset your password, you can log in with the new credentials.

If you have any trouble with the password reset process, please contact our support team directly and we'll be happy to assist you further. Let me know if you need anything else!
